description: iter-7 M1'' per-prompt judged generations (PRESERVATION roles RETAIN+UNRELATED) for the DECISIVE operator pair KG-ABL vs DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED. Each row has per-operator judge scores (fluency 0-2, content_pres 0-2); joint utility = harmonic_mean(fluency, content_pres). The demo recomputes the paired bootstrap joint-diff CI, the 3-way fork, and the aggregate verdict from these rows.
